creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Unfortunately I am unable to reproduce this although I am not using ports. These are my latest builds in poudriere:
https://pkg.bofh.network/data/latest-per-pkg/qemu-guest-agent/8.2.1/

Neither do I see a fallout for this.

I would advise on rebuilding py-setuptools and recheck.

As always stated it's not possible to replicate the exact environment of some other hosts, ports usage should be avoided and poudriere is advised if custom pkgs are required.

If you want to add some more info you can but I am closing this for now.
